candidate_problem_record.subject: Biology
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text:
The following graphs show the permeability of ions during an action potential in a ventricular contractile cardiac fiber. 
Based on the graph, the resting membrane potential of the muscle fibers is closest to
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh:
下图显示了心室收缩期间心肌细胞动作电位的离子渗透性变化。心肌细胞的动作电位与骨骼肌类似。根据图示,心肌细胞的静息膜电位最接近以下哪个值?

A. $-90\ \mathrm{mV}$
B. $-70\ \mathrm{mV}$ 
C. $0\ \mathrm{mV}$
D. $+70\ \mathrm{mV}$
metadata.explanation_zh: 根据图示,肌纤维的静息膜电位接近 -90 mV。
